description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic from Avraham Dhabbāḥ probably to his sister in Fusṭāṭ/Cairo. He begs forgiveness for not yet having sent his brothers 27.5 qirsh and reminds them that he previously sent 50. He sends regards to their mother and asks for news of their nephew Ḥayyim. He mentions that he is cutting a garment (wa-aqṭaʿ qumāsh) that will be delivered soon.
